meta-description: Learn about investment income by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Investment income
excerpt: The income you get from an investment, like interest you get from a bank or dividends you get from a stock you own.
content:
The income you get from an investment, like interest you get from a bank or dividends you get from a stock you own.

Review IRS Publication 550 for more information.
